caption:
Three reps get the same lead notification. Zero of them call.

The problem is routing: no one owns the lead.

The fix: assign every new lead to one owner the second it arrives. Set a 5-minute claim window. No logged call or text by then, the lead reassigns and a manager gets pinged.

Speed to lead only works when someone owns the lead. A three-person team arguing over whose turn it is loses to a solo owner with one clear rule.

Pull the report Friday: average claim time per rep. The gaps show exactly who needs a nudge.

DM TRIAL
#leadgeneration #homeservices #contractormarketing #speedtolead #crmautomation
rationale: Fills an uncovered CRM-operations gap (team bystander effect on shared leads) with a concrete auto-assign-and-escalate rule, using the reel format research shows still wins reach for cold-audience teaching content.
